name: Probation Confirmation Reminder
script:
today_date = frappe.utils.getdate(frappe.utils.today()) employees = frappe.get_all("Employee", filters={"status": "Active"}, fields=["name", "employee_name", "date_of_joining", "reports_to", "company_email", "custom_probation_end_date", "custom_probation_notified"] ) for emp in employees: if not emp.date_of_joining: continue if not emp.custom_probation_end_date: probation_end = frappe.utils.add_months(frappe.utils.getdate(emp.date_of_joining), 6) frappe.db.set_value("Employee", emp.name, "custom_probation_end_date", probation_end) emp.custom_probation_end_date = probation_end probation_end = frappe.utils.getdate(emp.custom_probation_end_date) days_remaining = frappe.utils.date_diff(probation_end, today_date) if days_remaining == 15 and not emp.custom_probation_notified: manager_email = None manager_name = "Manager" if emp.reports_to: manager = frappe.db.get_value("Employee", emp.reports_to, ["company_email", "employee_name"], as_dict=True) if manager: manager_email = manager.company_email manager_name = manager.employee_name hr_managers = frappe.db.sql(""" SELECT DISTINCT u.email FROM `tabUser` u JOIN `tabHas Role` hr ON hr.parent = u.name WHERE hr.role = 'HR Manager' AND u.enabled = 1 AND u.email != '' """, as_dict=True) cc_emails = [r.email for r in hr_managers if r.email] if not manager_email: continue site_url = frappe.utils.get_url() confirm_url = site_url + "/probation-response?employee=" + emp.name + "&action=confirm" extend_url = site_url + "/probation-response?employee=" + emp.name + "&action=extend" frappe.sendmail( recipients=[manager_email], cc=cc_emails, subject="Action Required: Probation Review for " + emp.employee_name, message=( "

Dear " + manager_name + ",

" "

The probation period of " + emp.employee_name + "" " (ID: " + emp.name + ") ends on " + str(probation_end) + " (15 days from today).

" "

Please take action:

" "" "" "" "
" "Confirm Employee" "" "Extend by 2 Months" "
" "

Regards,
HR System

" ) ) frappe.db.set_value("Employee", emp.name, "custom_probation_notified", 1) frappe.db.commit()

name: Probation Action Handler
script:
employee = frappe.form_dict.get("employee") action = frappe.form_dict.get("action") emp = frappe.get_doc("Employee", employee) hr_managers = frappe.db.sql(""" SELECT DISTINCT u.email FROM `tabUser` u JOIN `tabHas Role` hr ON hr.parent = u.name WHERE hr.role = 'HR Manager' AND u.enabled = 1 AND u.email != '' """, as_dict=True) cc_list = [r.email for r in hr_managers if r.email] if emp.user_id: cc_list.append(emp.user_id) if action == "confirm": emp.final_confirmation_date = frappe.utils.today() emp.save(ignore_permissions=True) frappe.db.commit() if emp.reports_to: manager = frappe.get_doc("Employee", emp.reports_to) if manager.company_email: frappe.sendmail( recipients=[manager.company_email], cc=cc_list, subject="Employee Confirmed: " + emp.employee_name, message=( "

Dear " + manager.employee_name + ",

" "

" + emp.employee_name + " has been confirmed effective " + frappe.utils.today() + ".

" "

Regards,
HR System

" ) ) frappe.response["message"] = ( "
" "

✓ Employee Confirmed

" "

" + emp.employee_name + " has been confirmed as a permanent employee.

" "

HR team has been notified.

" "
" ) elif action == "extend": current_end = frappe.utils.getdate(emp.custom_probation_end_date) new_end = frappe.utils.add_months(current_end, 2) emp.custom_probation_end_date = new_end emp.custom_probation_notified = 0 emp.save(ignore_permissions=True) frappe.db.commit() if emp.reports_to: manager = frappe.get_doc("Employee", emp.reports_to) if manager.company_email: frappe.sendmail( recipients=[manager.company_email], cc=cc_list, subject="Probation Extended: " + emp.employee_name, message=( "

Dear " + manager.employee_name + ",

" "

Probation extended by 2 months.

" "

New end date: " + str(new_end) + "

" "

Regards,
HR System

" ) ) frappe.response["message"] = ( "
" "

⌛ Probation Extended

" "

New end date for " + emp.employee_name + ": " "" + str(new_end) + "

" "

A reminder will be sent 15 days before the new end date.

" "
" )

name: Notify HR when Employee UPDATES a field
Merge Pre-Offer Form to Job Applicant
script:
existing = None
if doc.email_id:
    existing = frappe.db.get_value(
        "Job Applicant",
        {"email_id": doc.email_id, "name": ["!=", doc.name]},
        "name"
    )
if not existing and doc.phone_number:
    existing = frappe.db.get_value(
        "Job Applicant",
        {"phone_number": doc.phone_number, "name": ["!=", doc.name]},
        "name"
    )

if existing:
    existing_doc = frappe.get_doc("Job Applicant", existing)

    current_count = existing_doc.get("custom_preoffer_submission_count") or 0
    if current_count >= 2:
        frappe.throw(
            "This link has expired. Please contact HR for assistance.",
            title="Link Expired"
        )

    sent_on = existing_doc.get("custom_preoffer_sent_on")
    if sent_on:
        sent_on_dt = frappe.utils.get_datetime(sent_on)
        hours_passed = frappe.utils.time_diff_in_hours(frappe.utils.now_datetime(), sent_on_dt)
        if hours_passed > 24:
            frappe.throw(
                "This link has expired. Please contact HR for assistance.",
                title="Link Expired"
            )

    fields_to_merge = [
        "custom_father_spouse_name",
        "custom_permanent_address",
        "custom_current_address",
        "custom_aadhar_number",
        "custom_pan_number",
        "custom_bank_account_number",
        "custom_bank_name",
        "custom_ifsc_code",
        "custom_current_employer",
        "custom_current_designation",
        "custom_current_ctc",
        "custom_expected_ctc",
        "custom_notice_period",
        "custom_last_working_day",
        "custom_aadhar_upload",
        "custom_pan_upload",
        "custom_10th_marksheet",
        "custom_12th_marksheet",
        "custom_sem_marksheet",
        "custom_degree_certificate",
        "custom_experience_certificate",
        "custom_last_salary_slip",
        "custom_bank_passbook",
        "custom_other_documents",
        "custom_declaration_agreement",
        "resume_attachment",
    ]

    for field in fields_to_merge:
        value = doc.get(field)
        if value:
            existing_doc.set(field, value)

    existing_doc.custom_preoffer_submission_count = current_count + 1

    existing_doc.flags.ignore_permissions = True
    existing_doc.save()

    frappe.delete_doc("Job Applicant", doc.name, force=True)

    frappe.msgprint(
        f"Data merged into existing applicant: {existing}",
        indicator="green"
    )

name: Notify Candidate - Interview Scheduled
script:
candidate_email = frappe.db.get_value( "Job Applicant", doc.job_applicant, "email_id" ) candidate_name = frappe.db.get_value( "Job Applicant", doc.job_applicant, "applicant_name" ) if candidate_email and not doc.custom_notification_sent: # Format date and time interview_date = frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.scheduled_on) if doc.scheduled_on else "" from_time = str(doc.from_time)[:5] if doc.from_time else "" to_time = str(doc.to_time)[:5] if doc.to_time else "" mode = doc.custom_interview_mode or "Face to Face" location = doc.custom_interview_location or "Will be informed shortly" instructions = doc.custom_interview_instructions or "" # Get Interviewers interviewers = [] interviewer_emails = [] if doc.interview_details: for i in doc.interview_details: if i.interviewer: interviewers.append(i.interviewer) # Get interviewer email from User or Employee doctype interviewer_email = frappe.db.get_value( "User", i.interviewer, "email" ) if interviewer_email: interviewer_emails.append(interviewer_email) interviewer_str = ", ".join(interviewers) if interviewers else "Will be informed shortly" # ───────────────────────────────────────── # EMAIL SUBJECT # ───────────────────────────────────────── subject = ( "Interview Scheduled - " + (doc.designation or "Position") + " - Aionion Capital" ) # ───────────────────────────────────────── # SHARED DETAILS BLOCK (reused in both emails) # ───────────────────────────────────────── details_table = ( "
" "

Interview Details

" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "
Candidate" + (candidate_name or "N/A") + "
Interview Round" + (doc.interview_round or "") + "
Date" + interview_date + "
Time" + from_time + " - " + to_time + "
Mode" + mode + "
Location / Link" + location + "
Interviewer(s)" + interviewer_str + "
" "
" ) # ───────────────────────────────────────── # 1. CANDIDATE EMAIL # ───────────────────────────────────────── candidate_message = ( "
" "
" "

Interview Invitation

" "

Aionion Capital

" "
" "
" "

Dear " + (candidate_name or "Candidate") + ",

" "

Congratulations! Your resume has been shortlisted. " "You are invited for an interview.

" + details_table ) if instructions: candidate_message += ( "
" "Special Instructions:
" + instructions + "
" ) candidate_message += ( "
" "Please bring the following documents:" "
    " "
  • Updated Resume (2 copies)
    • " "
  • Original ID Proof (Aadhar/PAN)
    • " "
  • Educational Certificates
    • " "
  • Experience Certificate (if applicable)
    • " "
  • Last 3 months salary slips (if applicable)
    • " "
" "
" "

Please confirm attendance by replying to this email " "or contact HR at " "hr@aionioncapital.com

" "

We look forward to meeting you!

" "

Warm Regards,
HR Team
Aionion Capital

" "
" "
" "

Aionion Capital HRMS

" "
" "
" ) frappe.sendmail( recipients=[candidate_email], subject=subject, message=candidate_message, reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, ) # ───────────────────────────────────────── # 2. INTERVIEWER EMAIL # ───────────────────────────────────────── if interviewer_emails: interviewer_subject = ( "Interview Assigned to You - " + (candidate_name or "Candidate") + " | " + (doc.designation or "Position") + " - Aionion Capital" ) interviewer_message = ( "
" "
" "

Interview Assignment

" "

Aionion Capital

" "
" "
" "

Dear Interviewer,

" "

You have been assigned to conduct an interview. " "Please find the details below and make sure to be available at the scheduled time.

" + details_table ) if instructions: interviewer_message += ( "
" "Special Instructions:
" + instructions + "
" ) interviewer_message += ( "
" "Reminders:" "
    " "
  • Please review the candidate's profile before the interview.
    • " "
  • Be available 5 minutes before the scheduled time.
    • " "
  • Share your feedback in the system after the interview.
    • " "
" "
" "

For any queries, contact HR at " "hr@aionioncapital.com

" "

Warm Regards,
HR Team
Aionion Capital

" "
" "
" "

Aionion Capital HRMS

" "
" "
" ) frappe.sendmail( recipients=interviewer_emails, subject=interviewer_subject, message=interviewer_message, reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, ) # ───────────────────────────────────────── # Mark Notification Sent # ───────────────────────────────────────── frappe.db.set_value( "Interview", doc.name, "custom_notification_sent", 1 ) frappe.msgprint( "Interview notification sent to " + (candidate_name or candidate_email) + (" and " + str(len(interviewer_emails)) + " interviewer(s)." if interviewer_emails else "."), indicator="green", title="Email Sent!" )

name: Job Requisition - HR Approved Handler
script:
type_of_req = doc.custom_type_of_requirement or "" # ── NEW POSITION → Notify HR Manager for approval ────────── if type_of_req == "New Position" and doc.workflow_state == "Pending HR Approval": hr_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "HR Manager", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) recipients = [] for u in hr_users: email = frappe.db.get_value("User", u.parent, "email") if email: recipients.append(email) if recipients: form_url = frappe.utils.get_url_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name) frappe.sendmail( recipients=list(set(recipients)), subject="[New Position] Job Requisition Pending Your Approval - " + (doc.designation or doc.name), message=( "

Dear HR Manager,

" "

A New Position Job Requisition has been submitted and requires your approval.

" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "
Requisition" + doc.name + "
Designation" + (doc.designation or "") + "
Department" + (doc.department or "") + "
No of Positions" + str(doc.no_of_positions or "") + "
Urgency Level" + (doc.custom_urgency_level or "") + "
Proposed Salary" + (doc.custom_proposed_salary or "") + "
" "

Review & Approve

" "

Regards,
System
Aionion Capital

" ), reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, ) # ── REPLACEMENT → HR approves → notify Final Approver & Director ── if type_of_req == "Replacement" and doc.workflow_state == "Pending HR Approval": hr_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "HR Manager", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) recipients = [] for u in hr_users: email = frappe.db.get_value("User", u.parent, "email") if email: recipients.append(email) if recipients: form_url = frappe.utils.get_url_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name) frappe.sendmail( recipients=list(set(recipients)), subject="[Replacement] Job Requisition Pending Your Approval - " + (doc.designation or doc.name), message=( "

Dear HR Manager,

" "

A Replacement Job Requisition has been submitted and requires your approval.

" "" "" "" "" "" "
Requisition" + doc.name + "
Designation" + (doc.designation or "") + "
Department" + (doc.department or "") + "
No of Positions" + str(doc.no_of_positions or "") + "
" "

Review & Approve

" "

Regards,
System
Aionion Capital

" ), reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, )

name: Job Requisition - Pending Final Approval Handler
script:
type_of_req = doc.custom_type_of_requirement or "" # ── NEW POSITION → Notify Final Approver to approve ──────── if type_of_req == "New Position" and doc.workflow_state == "Pending Final Approval": fa_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "Final Approver", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) director_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "Director", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) recipients = [] for u in fa_users + director_users: email = frappe.db.get_value("User", u.parent, "email") if email: recipients.append(email) if recipients: form_url = frappe.utils.get_url_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name) frappe.sendmail( recipients=list(set(recipients)), subject="[New Position] Final Approval Required - " + (doc.designation or doc.name), message=( "

Dear Team,

" "

A New Position Requisition requires your Final Approval.

" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "
Requisition" + doc.name + "
Designation" + (doc.designation or "") + "
Department" + (doc.department or "") + "
No of Positions" + str(doc.no_of_positions or "") + "
Urgency Level" + (doc.custom_urgency_level or "") + "
Proposed Salary" + (doc.custom_proposed_salary or "") + "
" "

Final Approve

" "

Regards,
System
Aionion Capital

" ), reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, ) # ── REPLACEMENT → Skip Final Approval → Auto Approve ─────── if type_of_req == "Replacement" and doc.workflow_state == "Pending Final Approval": # Auto move to Approved frappe.db.set_value("Job Requisition", doc.name, "workflow_state", "Approved") # Notify Final Approver & Director (FYI only) fa_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "Final Approver", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) director_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "Director", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) recipients = [] for u in fa_users + director_users: email = frappe.db.get_value("User", u.parent, "email") if email: recipients.append(email) if recipients: form_url = frappe.utils.get_url_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name) frappe.sendmail( recipients=list(set(recipients)), subject="[FYI] Replacement Position Approved - " + (doc.designation or doc.name), message=( "

Dear Team,

" "

This is to inform you that a Replacement position has been approved by HR Manager.

" "

No action required from your end.

" "" "" "" "" "" "" "
Requisition" + doc.name + "
Designation" + (doc.designation or "") + "
Department" + (doc.department or "") + "
No of Positions" + str(doc.no_of_positions or "") + "
TypeReplacement
" "

View Requisition

" "

Regards,
HR Team
Aionion Capital

" ), reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, )

name: Notify HR Manager - Job Requisition Fully Approved
script:
if doc.workflow_state == "Approved": hr_users = frappe.get_all( "Has Role", filters={"role": "HR Manager", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"] ) recipients = [] for u in hr_users: email = frappe.db.get_value("User", u.parent, "email") if email: recipients.append(email) if doc.requested_by: user_id = frappe.db.get_value("Employee", doc.requested_by, "user_id") if user_id: requesting_email = frappe.db.get_value("User", user_id, "email") if requesting_email: recipients.append(requesting_email) if recipients: form_url = frappe.utils.get_url_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name) type_of_req = doc.custom_type_of_requirement or "" frappe.sendmail( recipients=list(set(recipients)), subject="Job Requisition APPROVED - Start Recruitment - " + (doc.designation or doc.name), message=( "

Dear HR Team,

" "

The Job Requisition is Approved. Please start recruitment.

" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "
Requisition" + doc.name + "
Type" + type_of_req + "
Requested By" + (doc.requested_by_name or doc.requested_by or "") + "
Designation" + (doc.designation or "") + "
Department" + (doc.department or "") + "
No of Positions" + str(doc.no_of_positions or "") + "
Urgency Level" + (doc.custom_urgency_level or "") + "
" "

View Requisition

" "

Regards,
System
Aionion Capital

" ), reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, )

name: Notify Hiring Manager - Job Requisition Rejected
script:
if doc.workflow_state == "Rejected": recipient_email = None if doc.requested_by: user_id = frappe.db.get_value("Employee", doc.requested_by, "user_id") if user_id: recipient_email = frappe.db.get_value("User", user_id, "email") if recipient_email: form_url = frappe.utils.get_url_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name) frappe.sendmail( recipients=[recipient_email], subject="Job Requisition REJECTED - " + (doc.designation or doc.name), message=( "

Dear " + (doc.requested_by_name or "Hiring Manager") + ",

" "

Your Job Requisition has been Rejected.

" "" "" "" "" "
Requisition" + doc.name + "
Designation" + (doc.designation or "") + "
Department" + (doc.department or "") + "
" "

View Requisition

" "

Regards,
HR Team
Aionion Capital

" ), reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, )

name: Notify Manager - Employee Onboarding Assigned
script:
if doc.workflow_state == "Pending Manager Input": recipients = [] if doc.hiring_manager: email = frappe.db.get_value( "User", doc.hiring_manager, "email" ) if email: recipients.append(email) if recipients: form_url = frappe.utils.get_url_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name) frappe.sendmail( recipients=recipients, subject="Action Required: Fill Onboarding Activities - " + (doc.employee_name or doc.name), message=( "

Dear Manager,

" "

Please fill the onboarding activities for new joiner " + (doc.employee_name or "") + ".

" "" "" "" "" "" "
Employee" + (doc.employee_name or "") + "
Department" + (doc.department or "") + "
Designation" + (doc.designation or "") + "
Date of Joining" + str(doc.date_of_joining or "") + "
" "

Please add onboarding activities like Laptop, SIM, Email ID, Seating etc.

" "

Fill Activities

" "

Regards,
HR Team

" ), )

name: Notify HR - Onboarding Activities Submitted
script:
if doc.workflow_state == "Pending HR Review": hr_users = frappe.get_all( "Has Role", filters={ "role": "HR Manager", "parenttype": "User" }, fields=["parent"] ) recipients = [] for u in hr_users: email = frappe.db.get_value( "User", u.parent, "email" ) if email: recipients.append(email) if recipients: form_url = frappe.utils.get_url_to_form( doc.doctype, doc.name ) activity_rows = "" for a in doc.activities: activity_rows += ( "" "" + (a.activity_name or "") + "" "" + (a.user or "") + "" "" ) frappe.sendmail( recipients=list(set(recipients)), subject="Review Onboarding Activities - " + (doc.employee_name or doc.name), message=( "

Dear HR Manager,

" "

Manager has submitted onboarding activities for " + (doc.employee_name or "") + ". Please review and approve.

" "" "" "" "" "" + activity_rows + "
ActivityAssigned To
" "

" "Review & Approve

" "

Regards,
System

" ), )

name: Create Helpdesk Tickets - Employee Onboarding
script:
if doc.workflow_state == "Onboarding In Progress": for activity in doc.activities: # Skip if no user assigned if not activity.user: continue # Get user email user_email = frappe.db.get_value( "User", activity.user, "email" ) if not user_email: continue # Create Helpdesk Ticket ticket = frappe.new_doc("HD Ticket") ticket.subject = ( (activity.activity_name or "Onboarding Task") + " - " + (doc.employee_name or doc.name) ) ticket.description = ( "

Onboarding Activity for New Joiner

" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "
Employee" + (doc.employee_name or "") + "
Department" + (doc.department or "") + "
Designation" + (doc.designation or "") + "
Date of Joining" + str(doc.date_of_joining or "") + "
Activity" + (activity.activity_name or "") + "
Assigned To" + (activity.user or "") + "
" ) # Ticket created by current user ticket.raised_by = frappe.session.user # Insert Ticket ticket.insert(ignore_permissions=True) # Create Assignment todo = frappe.new_doc("ToDo") todo.owner = activity.user todo.assigned_by = frappe.session.user todo.reference_type = "HD Ticket" todo.reference_name = ticket.name todo.description = ( activity.activity_name or "Onboarding Task" ) todo.insert(ignore_permissions=True) # Send Mail Notification frappe.sendmail( recipients=[user_email], subject=( "New Onboarding Task: " + (activity.activity_name or "") + " - " + (doc.employee_name or "") ), message=( "

Dear Team,

" "

A new onboarding task has been assigned to you.

" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "
New Joiner" + (doc.employee_name or "") + "
Task" + (activity.activity_name or "") + "
Department" + (doc.department or "") + "
Date of Joining" + str(doc.date_of_joining or "") + "
" "

Please complete this task before the joining date.

" "

Regards,
" "HR Team
" "Aionion Capital

" ), ) frappe.msgprint( "Helpdesk tickets and assignments created successfully!", indicator="green", title="Success" )

name: Rejection mail for candidate
script:
if doc.status == "Rejected": # Check if email already sent using a custom flag already_sent = frappe.db.get_value("Job Applicant", doc.name, "custom_rejection_mail_sent") if not already_sent: candidate_email = doc.email_id candidate_name = doc.applicant_name or "Candidate" job_opening = doc.job_title or "" if candidate_email: frappe.sendmail( recipients=[candidate_email], subject="Update on Your Application - Aionion Capital", message=( "
" "
" "

Application Update

" "

Aionion Capital

" "
" "
" "

Dear " + candidate_name + ",

" "

Thank you for your interest in the " + job_opening + " " "position at Aionion Capital and for the time you invested " "in our recruitment process.

" "

After careful consideration, we regret to inform you that " "we will not be moving forward with your application at this time. " "This was a difficult decision as we had many strong candidates.

" "

We encourage you to keep an eye on our future openings as we " "would be happy to consider you for roles that may be a better fit.

" "

We wish you all the best in your job search and future endeavors.

" "

Warm Regards,
HR Team
Aionion Capital

" "
" "
" "

" "Aionion Capital HRMS

" "
" "
" ), reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, ) # Mark as sent so it doesn't fire again frappe.db.set_value("Job Applicant", doc.name, "custom_rejection_mail_sent", 1)
